name: compliance sync mechanism: when a catalog entry is removed, the corresponding folder is archived (moved to _meta/archived/) rather than silently deleted
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro generated-code-quality-standards/us-government/sox-itcc generated-code-quality-standards/_meta && printf 'rule-file\n' > generated-code-quality-standards/us-government/sox-itcc/sentinel.yaml && printf -- '' > .claude-tdd-pro/COMPLIANCE-URLS.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/compliance/sync-from-sources.sh" --catalog "$PWD/.claude-tdd-pro/COMPLIANCE-URLS.yaml" --target "$PWD/generated-code-quality-standards" --on-removal archive && ! test -d generated-code-quality-standards/us-government/sox-itcc && test -d generated-code-quality-standards/_meta/archived/sox-itcc && echo ok 1>&2
